name: minecraft-wire-viewer
description: Decode flayerproxy sniffer .wire captures with libchunk

minecraftWireViewer.pngRoot.description: Root directory for chunk PNGs (parent of rx*/). Empty = infer from wire path (strip /raw/).

minecraftWireViewer.showHexDump.description: Include hex dump in the decode view (slower for large captures).

minecraftWireViewer.showHexWhenUndecoded.description: Show hex dump when the packet is recognized but libchunk has no structured decoder (or decode failed).

minecraftWireViewer.watchFileChanges.description: Re-decode when the .wire file is overwritten (e.g. live sniffer). Disable if tabs feel sluggish.

minecraftWireViewer.refreshDebounceMs.description: Debounce ms before re-decoding after a file change.

scripts.package:vsix: npm run build:libchunk && npm run compile && npm run bundle:libchunk && vsce package --allow-missing-repository
scripts.postinstall: npm run build:libchunk && npm run bundle:libchunk
